user_query: I want to surprise my family with some interesting facts and jokes about Chuck Norris. Give me a random Chuck Norris joke and search for Chuck Norris jokes that mention interesting facts. Also, get the details of a specific player from the Free NBA API with the ID '9876'.

TaskList.description: Get a random Chuck Norris joke.
Search for Chuck Norris jokes that mention interesting facts.
Retrieve details of the NBA player with the ID '9876'.
